rag_rules: Fix type mismatches by ensuring AGREE expressions use correct scalar types (int, real, bool) and that helper declarations match actual expression types.
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors by ensuring all identifiers in guarantees are visible or properly declared in the same annex.
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations in AGREE.
Place component type contracts in component type scopes, not implementations.
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponents in component type annexes.
Ensure all AGREE identifiers are visible or declared within the same annex.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE logical operators include 'and', 'or', 'not(...)', and implication '=>'.
Equations assigning values must match the number of variables on the left side with the number of return values on the right.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers in AGREE annexes unless they are present in the model.
Do not reference identifiers that are not visible or declared in the same annex.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
